news.t: Victory Capital Expands VictoryShares® ETF Offering

holdings.infoBox: MODL is an equity ETF with a total of 360 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 6.17%, Apple at 5.58%, Alphabet at 5.02%, Alphabet at 4.34%, and Microsoft at 3.66%.

overview.description: The VictoryShares WestEnd U.S. Sector ETF (MODL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund actively invests in sector-based US ETFs that may achieve favorable returns from current market conditions and macroeconomic factors. MODL was launched on Oct 11, 2022 and is issued by VictoryShares.

data.title: Victory Capital Expands VictoryShares® ETF Offering
data.text: SAN ANTONIO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $VCTR--Victory Capital Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: VCTR) (“Victory Capital” or the “Company”) today announced that its wholly owned investment adviser, Victory Capi...
